scripts.dev: npm run shared:build -w @squelch/shared && npm run server:dev -w server && npm run client:dev -w client
scripts.build: npm run shared:build -w @squelch/shared && npm run server:build -w server && npm run client:build -w client
scripts.start: npm run shared:build -w @squelch/shared && npm run server:start -w server && npm run client:start -w client
